narrative:
Pleasant Twp. township has 2,502 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
